research.title: Claude Code /ultrareview Deep Dive — Cloud Bug-Hunting Agents Before Every Merge
research.whyTrending: Shipped early May 2026 as research preview (CLI 2.1.86). Fleet of 5–20 cloud agents, each focused on different bug class (concurrency, SQL injection, error boundaries). Every finding independently reproduced before reporting. $5–$20/run, 5–10 min. No competitor blog post covers the practical workflow yet.
